effect.name: Comb Splitter
effect.description:
Comb Splitter (LADSPA 1411)
Divides the input up into two parts with frequency peaks at f Hz intervals, skewed by f/2 Hz between the two outputs. Mixing the two outputs will get you exactly the input signal.
effect.author: Steve Harris (http://www.ladspa.org)

parameter.name: Band Separation
parameter.comment: The distance between the frequency peaks
